mapper.select: select id, payAccountId, targetPayAccountId, money, orderNumber, payDate, status from transferinfo where payAccountId = #{payAccountId} and payDate between #{startDate} and #{endDate};
select id, payAccountId, targetPayAccountId, money, orderNumber, payDate, status from transferinfo where targetPayAccountId = #{targetPayAccountId} and payDate between #{startDate} and #{endDate};

select transfer.payDate, -- 转账日期 payee.id, -- 转账对象的账户ID payeeUser.realname, -- 转账对象的姓名 payee.bankCardID -- 转账对象的银行卡号 from transferinfo transfer join payaccountinfo payee on payee.id = transfer.targetPayAccountId -- 转账对象的账户信息 join userinfo payeeUser on payeeUser.id = payee.userId -- 转账对象的用户信息 join payaccountinfo pay on pay.id = transfer.payAccountId -- 转账信息 join userinfo payUser on payUser.id = pay.userId -- 转账账户的用户信息 where payUser.id = #{id};
select id, payAccountId, targetPayAccountId, money, orderNumber, payDate, status from transferinfo where payAccountId = #{payAccountId} and status = 1;
select id, payAccountId, targetPayAccountId, money, orderNumber, payDate, status from transferinfo where targetPayAccountId = #{targetPayAccountId} and status = 1;
mapper.insert: insert into transferinfo(payAccountId, targetPayAccountId, money, orderNumber, payDate, status) value (#{payAccountId}, #{targetPayAccountId}, #{money}, #{orderNumber}, #{payDate}, 1);
